      • of

        public static JkBeanDescription of(java.lang.Class<? extends KBean> kbeanClass,

      • toMdContent

        public JkBeanDescription.MdContent toMdContent()
        Generates markdown content describing the bean, including its fields, methods, and initialization details. The generated content is formatted as a markdown table.
        Returns:
        A formatted string in markdown representing the bean's information including its fields, methods, and initialization description if available.
